title: Content Publishing Workflows
objective: Validate and orchestrate publish readiness for website content, landing pages, embeds, and fundraising dependencies.

steps.description: Identify the content entry, target audience, go-live timing, and dependency list.
Check forms, campaigns, CTA links, and announcement references.
Confirm the actor can prepare a publish proposal even if the final action requires separate approval.
Create an ordered publish plan that avoids exposing incomplete content.

escalation_rules: Do not treat content visibility as complete unless dependencies are ready.
Escalate to announcement_workflows for linked outbound sends.
Escalate to donation_reconciliation if campaign attribution dependencies are unclear.
